_comment: Single source of truth for MUTABLE public brand values (launch: Tubble.md). A future public rename edits THIS file, then regenerates/validates via `pnpm check:brand`. Compatibility-sensitive identifiers (bundle IDs, protocol schemes, package namespaces, persisted paths) live in compatibility.json, NOT here. Upstream attribution values live in attribution below and are intentionally NOT renamed.
tagline: A fork of Hubble.md — the Markdown notepad for you and your agents.

web._todo: Phase 1 step 7: set the operated hosted-trial front-door URL and verify control before publishing. Until then this stays UNRESOLVED and `pnpm check:brand` flags it.

attribution._comment: Upstream provenance. Intentionally retained and clearly labeled as the ORIGINAL project, never presented as the fork's own account. MIT copyright notice must be preserved.
